result.text:
GM! Happy Monday! 🌞😎

'Singularity of Attention' ⚫️👀
on @foundation 🔗🔽

Deep within the labyrinth of reality lies a curious mystery: the double-slit experiment, where particles behave differently under the gaze of an observer. But what if the missing piece of the puzzle isn’t matter or energy, but attention itself? Imagine a world where 'quanta of attention' float unseen, waiting to be gathered and focused. Could it be that the observer’s gaze is the wand that weaves the fabric of reality? Perhaps the theory of everything begins not with equations, but with the gentle tug of curiosity.

#nftarti̇st #NFTartists #AIart #aiartcommunity #NFTDrop

media.ext_alt_text: Ná Agontimé: queen of two worlds Honored in a square in the city of São Luís, in the state of Maranhão, the statue refers to the queen of the ancient kingdom of Dahomey, who came to Brazil as a slave. The technique used in the production of the piece is the superimposition and inversion of the image, generating mirroring. Ná Agontimé: queen of two worlds August, 2023 Photography monochrome 4608 x 3456 10,3 MB PNG

The technique used in the production of the piece is the superimposition and inversion of the image, generating mirroring.
